requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 / IEC 62933-5-2 as International Baseline; ABNORM Conformity; High-Temperature Derating (≥45 °C Sahel Conditions)
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619 / IEC 62933-5-2作为国际基准；ABNORM合格评定；高温降额（≥45 °C萨赫勒条件）
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619 / IEC 62933-5-2作為國際基準；ABNORM合格評定；高溫降額（≥45 °C薩赫勒條件）

summary.en: ABNORM (Agence Burkinabè de Normalisation, de la Métrologie et de la Qualité) is Burkina Faso's national standards body and adopts IEC standards for electrochemical energy storage. No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to a full mandatory IEC 62619 certification scheme (analogous to Saudi Arabia's SABER or the EU Battery Regulation) has been publicly identified under ABNORM as of the dataset date. However, IEC 62619:2022 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety baseline for lithium BESS cells and modules, and is referenced in project specifications for donor-funded and IPP grid-scale BESS in Burkina Faso. IEC 62933-5-2 is additionally referenced for system-level electrochemical BESS safety. A critical Burkina Faso-specific requirement not present in Qatar or China domestic contexts is high-ambient-temperature derating: Burkina Faso's Sahel climate regularly produces ambient temperatures of 40–50 °C, with extremes above 45 °C during the hot dry season (March–May). IEC 62619 mandates thermal abuse testing up to 60 °C for cells; however, system-level thermal management design — battery enclosure insulation, ventilation, HVAC sizing, and derating curves — must be specifically validated for continuous operation at ≥45 °C ambient, which significantly exceeds the default operating envelope of most Chinese BESS products designed for temperate climates. Dust and sand ingress (IP rating requirements) must also be addressed given Burkina Faso's harmattan wind conditions.
summary.zh: ABNORM（布基纳法索标准化、计量和质量机构）是布基纳法索国家标准机构，采纳IEC电化学储能标准。截至本数据集日期，ABNORM下尚无公开确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与完整强制性IEC 62619认证制度相当（类似沙特阿拉伯SABER或欧盟《电池法规》）。然而，IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全基准，并在布基纳法索捐助方资助和IPP电网规模BESS项目规格中引用。IEC 62933-5-2亦被引用用于系统级电化学BESS安全。布基纳法索特有的、在卡塔尔或中国国内背景中不存在的关键要求是高环境温度降额：布基纳法索萨赫勒气候环境温度定期达到40-50 °C，旱季（3-5月）极端温度超过45 °C。IEC 62619要求电芯热滥用测试温度高达60 °C；然而，系统级热管理设计——电池箱体隔热、通风、暖通空调选型和降额曲线——须专门针对环境温度≥45 °C的持续运行进行验证，这大幅超出大多数为温带气候设计的中国BESS产品的默认工作包络。鉴于布基纳法索哈马丹风条件，还须解决粉尘和沙粒侵入（IP防护等级要求）问题。
summary.zht: ABNORM（布吉納法索標準化、計量和質量機構）是布吉納法索國家標準機構，採納IEC電化學儲能標準。截至本數據集日期，ABNORM下尚無公開確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與完整強制性IEC 62619認證制度相當（類似沙特阿拉伯SABER或歐盟《電池法規》）。然而，IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全基準，並在布吉納法索捐助方資助和IPP電網規模BESS項目規格中引用。IEC 62933-5-2亦被引用用於系統級電化學BESS安全。布吉納法索特有的、在卡達或中國國內背景中不存在的關鍵要求是高環境溫度降額：布吉納法索薩赫勒氣候環境溫度定期達到40-50 °C，旱季（3-5月）極端溫度超過45 °C。IEC 62619要求電芯熱濫用測試溫度高達60 °C；然而，系統級熱管理設計——電池箱體隔熱、通風、暖通空調選型和降額曲線——須專門針對環境溫度≥45 °C的持續運行進行驗證，這大幅超出大多數為溫帶氣候設計的中國BESS產品的默認工作包絡。鑑於布吉納法索哈馬丹風條件，還須解決粉塵和沙粒侵入（IP防護等級要求）問題。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety; referenced in donor-funded project specifications in Burkina Faso)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level safety standard referenced in project specifications)
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation
ABNORM — Agence Burkinabè de Normalisation, de la Métrologie et de la Qualité (verify current regulated product list and any BESS-specific mandatory conformity obligation directly with ABNORM)
IEC 60529 — Degrees of Protection Provided by Enclosures (IP Code) — IP55 or higher typically required for outdoor BESS in high-dust Sahel environments

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), replacing the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters. Neither GB 44240-2024 nor GB/T 36276-2023 is harmonised with IEC 62619 and neither is accepted as a substitute in Burkina Faso donor-funded project specifications or ABNORM conformity review. Additionally, Chinese GB testing protocols are conducted at standard laboratory ambient temperatures (typically 25 °C ±2 °C) and do not include the extended high-ambient-temperature endurance validation required for Burkina Faso deployment. The Chinese BESS product range is predominantly designed for China's temperate climate zones (−20 °C to +45 °C enclosure environment); systems intended for sustained Sahel ambient operation at ≥45 °C require engineering re-evaluation of enclosure thermal design, BMS temperature thresholds, and battery derating curves.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023均未与IEC 62619协调，均不被布基纳法索捐助方资助项目规格或ABNORM合格评定审查接受为替代依据。此外，中国GB测试规程在标准实验室环境温度（通常25 °C ±2 °C）下进行，不包括布基纳法索部署所需的扩展高环境温度耐久性验证。中国BESS产品范围主要为中国温带气候区（−20 °C至+45 °C机箱环境）设计；拟在萨赫勒环境温度≥45 °C下持续运行的系统，须对机箱热设计、BMS温度阈值和电池降额曲线进行工程重新评估。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023均未與IEC 62619協調，均不被布吉納法索捐助方資助項目規格或ABNORM合格評定審查接受為替代依據。此外，中國GB測試規程在標準實驗室環境溫度（通常25 °C ±2 °C）下進行，不包括布吉納法索部署所需的擴展高環境溫度耐久性驗證。中國BESS產品範圍主要為中國溫帶氣候區（−20 °C至+45 °C機箱環境）設計；擬在薩赫勒環境溫度≥45 °C下持續運行的系統，須對機箱熱設計、BMS溫度閾值和電池降額曲線進行工程重新評估。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gaps: (1) IEC 62619 evidence — donor-funded and IPP project specifications in Burkina Faso reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety standard; Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not accepted as substitutes. Obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules to be supplied. (2) High-ambient-temperature validation (Burkina Faso-specific gap absent from Qatar and China domestic contexts) — Burkina Faso's Sahel climate means BESS systems must be validated for sustained continuous operation at ambient temperatures ≥45 °C. Chinese BESS products designed for standard climate zones require: (a) engineering review of enclosure thermal management (active cooling sizing, ventilation flow rates, HVAC derating at high ambient); (b) BMS high-temperature threshold reconfiguration and safety interlock validation at ≥45 °C ambient; (c) confirmed battery derating curves at elevated ambient for the specific cell chemistry and module configuration being supplied; (d) extended thermal cycling test evidence at high ambient if required by project specification. (3) Dust ingress — harmattan conditions require IP55 or higher enclosure rating for outdoor BESS installations; verify Chinese BESS enclosure IP ratings against project and site-specific dust exposure requirements. (4) ABNORM conformity — verify with ABNORM whether any mandatory product conformity obligation exists for imported BESS components before shipment.
gap.zh: 关键差距：（1）IEC 62619证据——布基纳法索捐助方资助和IPP项目规格将IEC 62619作为预期安全标准；中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不被接受为替代依据。须从ILAC认可实验室取得拟供应电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书。（2）高环境温度验证（布基纳法索特有差距，卡塔尔和中国国内背景不存在）——布基纳法索萨赫勒气候意味着BESS系统须在环境温度≥45 °C下经验证可持续连续运行。为标准气候区设计的中国BESS产品需要：（a）对机箱热管理（主动冷却选型、通风流量、高环境温度下暖通空调降额）进行工程审查；（b）在≥45 °C环境温度下重新配置BMS高温阈值并进行安全联锁验证；（c）确认所供应特定电芯化学体系和模组配置在高环境温度下的电池降额曲线；（d）如项目规格要求，在高环境温度下提供扩展热循环测试证据。（3）粉尘侵入——哈马丹条件要求室外BESS装置的机箱防护等级达到IP55或以上；根据项目和场地特定粉尘暴露要求核实中国BESS机箱IP等级。（4）ABNORM合格评定——在出货前向ABNORM核实进口BESS组件是否存在任何强制产品合格义务。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：（1）IEC 62619證據——布吉納法索捐助方資助和IPP項目規格將IEC 62619作為預期安全標準；中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不被接受為替代依據。須從ILAC認可實驗室取得擬供應電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書。（2）高環境溫度驗證（布吉納法索特有差距，卡達和中國國內背景不存在）——布吉納法索薩赫勒氣候意味著BESS系統須在環境溫度≥45 °C下經驗證可持續連續運行。為標準氣候區設計的中國BESS產品需要：（a）對機箱熱管理（主動冷卻選型、通風流量、高環境溫度下暖通空調降額）進行工程審查；（b）在≥45 °C環境溫度下重新配置BMS高溫閾值並進行安全聯鎖驗證；（c）確認所供應特定電芯化學體系和模組配置在高環境溫度下的電池降額曲線；（d）如項目規格要求，在高環境溫度下提供擴展熱循環測試證據。（3）粉塵侵入——哈馬丹條件要求室外BESS裝置的機箱防護等級達到IP55或以上；根據項目和場地特定粉塵暴露要求核實中國BESS機箱IP等級。（4）ABNORM合格評定——在出貨前向ABNORM核實進口BESS組件是否存在任何強制產品合格義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for donor-funded and IPP projects where project specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; ABNORM mandatory regulatory obligation for BESS has not been confirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with ABNORM; high-ambient-temperature validation is a practical project-gate requirement imposed by lender technical standards and site conditions
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary; neither is accepted as equivalent to IEC 62619 in Burkina Faso

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified under ABNORM as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Burkina Faso donor-funded project specifications. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient. A Burkina Faso-specific critical gap beyond the Qatar comparison is high-ambient-temperature (≥45 °C) and dust (harmattan/IP55+) validation — most Chinese BESS products are designed for temperate climates and require engineering re-evaluation before Sahel deployment. Verify ABNORM conformity obligations, obtain IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory, and conduct or obtain thermal-derating validation for ≥45 °C ambient conditions before committing to equipment procurement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，ABNORM下尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619是布基纳法索捐助方资助项目规格中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足够。超出卡塔尔对比的布基纳法索特有关键差距是高环境温度（≥45 °C）和粉尘（哈马丹/IP55+）验证——大多数中国BESS产品为温带气候设计，在萨赫勒部署前须进行工程重新评估。在设备采购确定前，须核实ABNORM合格义务、从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证据，并对≥45 °C环境条件进行或取得热降额验证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，ABNORM下尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619是布吉納法索捐助方資助項目規格中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足夠。超出卡達對比的布吉納法索特有關鍵差距是高環境溫度（≥45 °C）和粉塵（哈馬丹/IP55+）驗證——大多數中國BESS產品為溫帶氣候設計，在薩赫勒部署前須進行工程重新評估。在設備採購確定前，須核實ABNORM合格義務、從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證據，並對≥45 °C環境條件進行或取得熱降額驗證。
